input_excerpt:
Product keys: U-36, U-37, U-03
Schedule descriptions: VANITY CABINET - 60-IN | VANITY COUNTERTOP - 60-IN | MARBLE TOP | BATHROOM SINK | UNDERMOUNT | CERAMIC BASIN

Extracted source text:
MARLOW 60-in Double Vanity Suite — Model
MV-6022
Calderhouse Bath
The MARLOW vanity suite combines a 60-inch solid-birch cabinet, a honed Carrara marble countertop,
and two undermount ceramic basins sold as a coordinated set.
Cabinet: 60 in W x 22 in D x 34 in H, two soft-close doors and six dovetailed drawers. Countertop: 61 in
W x 22.5 in D x 1.25 in thick, pre-drilled for 8-in widespread faucets.
Materials: solid birch cabinet with plywood box, natural Carrara marble top, vitreous china basins.
Finishes: cabinet in dove white, storm grey, or natural birch; polished nickel or matte black hardware.
Certifications: cUPC listed basins. CARB Phase 2 compliant casework.
Installation: secure cabinet to wall studs with included cleats. Marble top requires two installers; seal
before first use. Rough-in drain at 21 in AFF recommended.
Care: reseal marble every 12 months. Clean with pH-neutral stone cleaner only. Wipe cabinet with
damp cloth.

structured_output.description: The Marlow Double Vanity Cabinet is the casework component of the coordinated Marlow 60-in Double Vanity Suite (Model MV-6022) by Calderhouse Bath. The cabinet is constructed of solid birch with a plywood box and features two soft-close doors and six dovetailed drawers. It is offered in three finish colors with a choice of polished nickel or matte black hardware. The unit is designed to receive the coordinating Carrara marble countertop and undermount ceramic basins sold as part of the suite.
structured_output.dimensions: 60 in W x 22 in D x 34 in H
structured_output.materials: Solid birch cabinet with plywood box
structured_output.finishes: Dove white, storm grey, or natural birch cabinet; polished nickel or matte black hardware
structured_output.installation_notes: Secure cabinet to wall studs using included cleats. Rough-in drain at 21 in AFF recommended.
structured_output.care_notes: Wipe cabinet exterior with a damp cloth.
important_specs: Sold as coordinated suite with countertop and basins
